metadata.description: Agent skills that work across AI coding tools

plugins.name: accessibility-wcag
plugins.description: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, semantic HTML, ARIA patterns, keyboard navigation, screen reader testing, color contrast, focus management, and automated accessibility testing with axe-core.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: api-design
plugins.description: REST API and GraphQL design best practices including resource naming, HTTP methods, status codes, pagination, error responses (RFC 7807), versioning, OpenAPI specs, authentication, rate limiting, GraphQL schema design, and subscriptions.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: api-testing
plugins.description: API testing with contract testing (Pact), mocking (MSW), load testing (k6), OpenAPI validation, and CI integration.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: asset-optimization
plugins.description: Asset pipeline optimization, compression, streaming, and resource management for game development.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: audio-systems
plugins.description: Game audio systems, spatial audio, FMOD/Wwise integration, adaptive music, and sound design.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: aws-essentials
plugins.description: AWS core services: Lambda, S3, RDS, CloudFront, IAM, SQS/SNS, DynamoDB. Least-privilege policies, presigned URLs, and cost optimization.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: ci-cd-pipelines
plugins.description: GitHub Actions and GitLab CI/CD pipeline expertise. Workflow syntax, caching, reusable workflows, deployment patterns, Docker builds, and branch protection.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Code review workflow for local changes and remote PRs with severity definitions, inline comments, and review output.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: codebase-analysis
plugins.description: Systematic codebase analysis and pre-production review. 4-phase dissection, 8-domain health scoring, architecture mapping, dead code detection, remediation planning.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: container-security
plugins.description: Container security with image scanning (Trivy, Grype), rootless containers, supply chain security (Cosign, SBOM), and Dockerfile hardening.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: cost-optimization
plugins.description: Cloud cost optimization: container right-sizing, CDN caching, serverless cold starts, spot instances, storage tiering, and cost monitoring.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: data-visualization
plugins.description: Data visualization with Recharts, Chart.js, and D3.js. Chart selection, responsive layouts, colorblind-safe palettes, and dashboard patterns.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: database-design
plugins.description: Database architecture for PostgreSQL and SQLite. Schema design, indexing, EXPLAIN ANALYZE, migrations, connection pooling, and ORM configuration.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: doc-generation
plugins.description: Documentation generation: OpenAPI, Mermaid diagrams, README generation, changelog automation, JSDoc/GoDoc, and Storybook.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: docker-kubernetes
plugins.description: Production Docker and Kubernetes: multi-stage builds, non-root users, K8s manifests, health checks, HPA autoscaling, security contexts, and Helm.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: docx
plugins.description: Word document creation, editing, and manipulation. Tables of contents, headings, tracked changes, images, and formatting.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: email-notifications
plugins.description: Email systems with SendGrid and AWS SES. React Email templates, deliverability (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), bounce handling, and queue-based processing.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: env-config
plugins.description: Environment configuration: .env management, Zod validation, secret management, 12-factor patterns, and Docker env injection.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: flutter-mobile
plugins.description: Flutter mobile development. Widget composition, Riverpod state, GoRouter navigation, platform channels, and performance optimization.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: framer-motion
plugins.description: Framer Motion animations for React. Variants, gestures, layout animations, AnimatePresence, scroll triggers, and spring physics.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: frontend-code-review
plugins.description: Frontend review checklist for .tsx, .ts, .js files. cn() usage, memoization, accessibility, and inline rules.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Production-grade frontend interfaces with CSS architecture, component patterns, layout systems, and motion design. BAD/GOOD pairs for every pattern.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: fullstack-developer
plugins.description: Full-stack web development with React, Node.js, databases, auth flow, and API error handling patterns.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: game-engines
plugins.description: Unity, Unreal Engine, and Godot. Engine-specific workflows, systems architecture, and production best practices.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: game-programming-languages
plugins.description: Game programming with C#, C++, GDScript. Syntax, patterns, and engine-specific idioms.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: game-servers
plugins.description: Game server architecture, matchmaking, WebSocket reconnection, and scalable backend systems for online games.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: gameplay-design
plugins.description: Game design theory and mechanics. MDA framework, balance formulas, combat systems, progression curves, input buffering, and feedback loops.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Git workflows: conventional commits, branch strategies, rebase, hooks (Husky), monorepo patterns, and bisect debugging.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: go-linter-configuration
plugins.description: golangci-lint setup and troubleshooting. Import resolution, .golangci.yml configs, CI optimization, and progressive linter adoption.

plugins.description: Godot 4 with GDScript 2.0. Typed syntax, node architecture, physics, state machines, resource management, and export templates.

plugins.name: golang-pro
plugins.description: Go 1.26+ with modern patterns, concurrency, HTTP routing, error handling, testing, and performance profiling.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.description: 3D graphics, shaders, VFX, lighting, and rendering optimization.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.description: Internationalization with next-intl and react-intl. ICU message syntax, plurals, RTL layout, and dynamic locale loading.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.description: Production incident response with actionable runbooks, blameless postmortems, status pages, rollback procedures, and SLO breach handling.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: level-design
plugins.description: Level design fundamentals, pacing, environmental storytelling, procedural generation with GDScript and C#, and BAD/GOOD design patterns.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: llm-integration
plugins.description: LLM/AI API integration with OpenAI and Anthropic. Structured output, tool calling, streaming, prompt engineering, and cost optimization.

plugins.name: local-security
plugins.description: Developer workstation security: SSH keys, GPG signing, credential managers, and secure environment setup.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: memory-management
plugins.description: Game memory optimization, object pooling, GC tuning, and resource management.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: monetization-systems
plugins.description: Game monetization: IAP, battle passes, ads integration, and ethical player retention.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: monitoring-observability
plugins.description: Production observability: structured logging, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, Grafana dashboards, and SLO/SLI alerting.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: multiplayer-netcode
plugins.description: Multiplayer networking and synchronization. Client prediction, server reconciliation, rollback netcode, lag compensation, and anti-cheat.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: nextjs-16
plugins.description: Next.js 16 with Turbopack, Cache Components, proxy.ts, Server Actions, React 19.2 View Transitions, and App Router patterns.

plugins.description: npm/pnpm package authoring: tsup bundling, dual ESM/CJS exports, semver, changesets, and monorepo setup.

plugins.description: Automate Google NotebookLM via Playwright: create notebooks, add sources, query with citations, generate slides, infographics, quizzes, flashcards, reports, data tables, and mind maps.

plugins.description: OAuth2 with PKCE, OIDC, JWT validation, session management, refresh token rotation, and Auth.js patterns.

plugins.description: Particle systems, physics simulation, and post-processing for dynamic game VFX.

plugins.description: Playwright E2E testing: page objects, role-based locators, network mocking, visual regression, and CI integration.

plugins.description: Advanced PostgreSQL: window functions, CTEs, JSONB, full-text search, partial indexes, partitioning, and PgBouncer.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: programming-architecture
plugins.description: Game code architecture: ECS, data-oriented design, state machines, and scalable system patterns.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.name: project-migration
plugins.description: Migrate project folders preserving Claude Code session data. Path encoding, rollback patterns, and orphan cleanup.
plugins.author: arcana

plugins.description: Platform submission for Steam, Epic, console, and mobile. Certification checklists and revenue splits.

plugins.description: React Native mobile: Expo, React Navigation, Zustand, FlatList optimization, Reanimated, and native modules.

plugins.description: Redis caching, sessions, rate limiting, pub/sub, sorted sets, streams, distributed locks, and connection pooling.

plugins.name: refactoring-patterns
plugins.description: Refactoring patterns: extract method, dead code elimination, dependency injection, SOLID principles, and strangler fig.

plugins.description: Remotion video creation in React. Animations, compositions, audio sync, text effects, and rendering.

plugins.description: Security review: OWASP Top 10, injection prevention, auth patterns, secrets management, dependency scanning, and security headers.

plugins.description: SEO and meta tags: Next.js metadata API, Open Graph, JSON-LD structured data, sitemaps, and dynamic OG images.

plugins.description: Specification-driven development with structured requirements, planning workflows, task breakdown, and quality gates.

plugins.description: Stripe integration: Checkout Sessions, subscriptions, webhook verification, idempotency, and SCA/3D Secure.

plugins.description: TypeScript strict types, generics, utility types, discriminated unions, and type-safe patterns.
